reason: Successfully executed all steps to verify agent functionality with GitHub integration and confirmed the agent returned the GitHub username
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents
Clicked on agent "QA-20260413-212325-755i" in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, status was "idle"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status confirmed as "idle"
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Waited 8 seconds and account access card appeared — Card asked to "Allow access to GitHub to retrieve your username?", GitHub account was already selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — Dialog appeared with options for how to allow the request
Clicked "Allow Once" button — Dialog closed, agent continued processing in "working" state
Waited for API request to complete — Agent transitioned back to "idle" after 43 seconds total processing
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Captured final screenshot — Screenshot saved showing complete response with username displayed
